title: Tanarius kurzii
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to find any information about Tanarius kurzii. It is possible that this plant is not well-documented or does not exist.
taxonomy: Tanarius kurzii is a genus of ant Mimic spiders in the family Cheiracanthiidae. It is a relatively newly discovered species, and thus, not a lot of information is available regarding its classification. However, based on its family, it is likely a member of the infraorder Araneomorphae. This infraorder is a subgroup of the more general order Araneomorphae, which consists of spiders with four-quadrant eyes. Tanarius kurzii's specific classification within the infraorder Araneomorphae may be more specific, but it is currently unclear.
